# @emisso/payroll

> Chilean payroll calculation engine — AFP, health, tax, unemployment, Previred, finiquito.

- Repo: https://github.com/emisso-ai/emisso-payroll
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@emisso/payroll
- License: MIT

## Install

npm install @emisso/payroll

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/emisso-ai/emisso-payroll/blob/main/README.md)
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/emisso-ai/emisso-payroll/blob/main/AGENTS.md)

## Key Features

- Calculate Chilean payroll: AFP, Fonasa/Isapre, income tax, unemployment, gratification
- Net-to-gross reverse solver ("pay 1.2M líquido — what's the gross?")
- Finiquito (severance) calculator with indemnización por años de servicio
- Previred DDJJ file generation and validation
- Pension reform Law 21.720 employer contribution
- Family allowance, SIS, mutual, APV, overtime
- Live indicator providers (UF, UTM, IMM from mindicador.cl)
- Self-hosted REST API with multi-tenant support (@emisso/payroll-api)

## API

- `calculateEmployeePayroll(employee, refData)` — Single employee calculation
- `calculatePayroll(input)` — Batch calculation for multiple employees
- `calculateNetToGross(netPay, options)` — Reverse: net → gross
- `calculateFiniquito(input)` — Severance/termination calculation
- `calculateOvertime(hours, baseSalary, type)` — Overtime pay
- `generatePreviredFile(data)` — Generate Previred DDJJ text file
- `validatePreviredData(data)` — Validate before Previred generation
- `DEFAULT_REFERENCE_DATA` — Default economic indicators (Feb 2026)
- `fetchCurrentIndicators()` — Live UF, UTM, UTA, IMM (from providers)
- `fetchAFPRates()` — Current AFP commission rates (from providers)
